VORFALE_TWEAKS.narrator.name: Narrator
VORFALE_TWEAKS.narrator.hint: Adds /narrate and /describe chat commands for cinematic narration.
VORFALE_TWEAKS.narrator.description: Adds v14-safe narration commands inspired by Narrator Tools: /narrate shows text in chat and as a fullscreen overlay, while /describe posts a centered descriptive chat message.
VORFALE_TWEAKS.narrator.PermissionDenied: Only a GM or Assistant GM can use narrator commands.
